instruction: In Terminal, help me use Whisper's tiny model to turn "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_1.ogg" into text and save the transcript to "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_transcript_1_1.txt".
reference_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_1.ogg" --model tiny --language en --output_format txt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && mv "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_en_1.txt" "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_transcript_1_1.txt" && rmdir "$tmpdir"

parameters.expected_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_1.ogg" --model tiny --language en --output_format txt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && cat "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_en_1.txt"; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
